c_1775810267689.name: 拟真少女
c_1775810267689.suffix:
/* === 基础质量锚点 === */
masterpiece, best quality, ultra-detailed, highly detailed, (detailed background:1.05),

/* === 日常抓拍感基调（支持内衣可见性逻辑，但不锁定具体光线）=== */
candid shot, everyday context, incidental moment,

/* === 主人物画风：半写实动漫 === */
(semi-realistic anime character:0.8),
[by yao_liao_wang], (by WLOP:0.1),
anatomically correct proportions,
soft body, petite frame,

/* === 皮肤材质：真实肌理（不锁定肤色）=== */
realistic skin texture with natural variation,
subsurface scattering,
realistic surface rendering,
natural material response,
physically accurate contours,

/* === 环境画风：写实背景兼容层 === */
(realistic environmental context:1.0),
realistic environmental objects,
ambient occlusion,
(depth of field:1.1),

/* === 风格解耦：人物动漫 / 环境写实 === */
(character in semi-realistic anime style:1.0),
(environment in photorealistic rendering:1.0),

/* === 色彩基调：中性色温，无固定色偏 === */
neutral color balance, accurate white balance, no color cast,
consistent lighting direction, unified light source,

/* === 细节保护 === */
high-frequency details preserved, no detail suppression
c_1775810267689.neg:
/* === 基础画质问题 === */
lowres, worst quality, low quality, jpeg artifacts, blurry,
text, signature, watermark, username, duplicate,

/* === 解剖与结构错误 === */
bad anatomy, bad proportions, disfigured, deformed,
malformed limbs, extra limbs, fused fingers, mutated hands,
asymmetric eyes, unnatural pose,

/* === 非目标艺术风格（防插画/2D污染）=== */
anime, cartoon, 2D, cel shading, flat colors,
stylized, illustration, drawing, sketch, painting,

/* === 皮肤材质崩坏 === */
doll-like, plastic skin, airbrushed, no skin texture,
uneven skin tone, hyperpigmentation, blotchy skin,
waxy skin, metallic skin, ceramic texture, plastic sheen on skin,
rubbery skin, latex appearance, silicone look, false sweating,

/* === 过度平滑与滤镜 === */
over-smooth skin, instagram filter, beauty mode,

/* === 摆拍感（防僵硬，但不锁定具体动作）=== */
posed, stiff posture, unnatural pose, artificial pose, stock photo pose,

/* === 衣物逻辑错误（画风层面，不锁定具体衣物）=== */
unnatural fabric, stiff clothing, floating clothes,
clipping, clothing penetration,
inconsistent clothing state, forced modesty,

/* === 背景简陋或风格错乱 === */
simple background, plain wall, empty room,
film grain, oil painting, matte painting,

/* === 冷色光污染（WLOP 溢出的常见问题）=== */
cyan rim light, blue ambient glow, unnatural cool glow,
cold color cast,

/* === 暖色/红色偏移 === */
overly warm, unnatural warm glow,
excessive red tint,
pink cast on skin,
warm color bias,
overall red haze,

/* === 全色域非自然色偏 === */
excessive color tint,
unnatural overall color cast,
monochromatic color wash,
artificial color saturation,
muddy color palette,
sickly skin tone,
jaundiced yellow tint,
greenish skin undertone (unless described),
bluish skin pallor (unless described),
purplish hue on body (unless described),
orange color bias on skin,
cyan color bleed,
magenta color shift,
desaturated except for one color,
overly saturated single color
